//UBX
B5 62 06 00 14 00 01 00 00 00 D0 08 00 00 00 96 00 00 03 00 01 00 00 00 00 00 8D 64
//ACK
B5 62 05 01 02 00 06 00 0E 37

//PVT
B5 62 06 01 08 00 01 07 00 01 00 00 00 00 18 E1
//ACK
B5 62 05 01 02 00 06 01 0F 38

//10Hz
B5 62 06 08 06 00 64 00 01 00 01 00 7A 12
//ACK
B5 62 05 01 02 00 06 08 16 3F

//SAVE
B5 62 06 09 0D 00 00 00 00 00 FF FF 00 00 00 00 00 00 03 1D AB
//ACK
B5 62 05 01 02 00 06 09 17 40
